about.title: About Us
about.heroDescription: Founded in 2009, Minimal began with a simple belief: that beautiful, functional design should be accessible to everyone. We curate timeless pieces that transform houses into homes.
about.missionDescription: To make beautiful, sustainable, and functional design accessible to everyone. We believe that your home should be a reflection of your values—simple, authentic, and thoughtfully curated.
about.missionQuote: “Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works. We create spaces that work beautifully for real life.”
about.valuesDescription: These principles guide everything we do, from product selection to customer service.
about.teamDescription: The passionate people behind Minimal, dedicated to bringing you exceptional design and service.
about.testimonialsDescription: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what our community has to say about their Minimal experience.
about.getInTouchDescription: Have questions about our products or need design advice? We'd love to hear from you.
about.aboutEndDescription: Discover our curated collection of minimalist home essentials and start creating your perfect space today.

values.title: Sustainability
values.description: We source materials responsibly and partner with eco-conscious manufacturers to minimize our environmental impact.

values.title: Quality Craftsmanship
values.description: Every piece is carefully selected for its superior quality, durability, and timeless design that lasts for generations.

values.title: Community Focus
values.description: We support local artisans and small businesses, fostering a community of creators who share our passion for minimalist design.

values.title: Customer Trust
values.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We stand behind every product with comprehensive warranties and exceptional service.

team.bio: With 15 years in interior design, Sarah founded Minimal to bring accessible, beautiful design to every home.
Marcus ensures every product meets our high standards for quality, functionality, and aesthetic appeal.
Elena leads our commitment to environmental responsibility and ethical sourcing practices.
David ensures every customer interaction reflects our values of care, quality, and attention to detail.

testimonials.content: Minimal has become my go-to source for clients who want clean, sophisticated pieces. The quality is consistently exceptional.
I've furnished my entire home with Minimal pieces. Each item is beautifully crafted and the customer service is outstanding.
The attention to detail and commitment to sustainability makes Minimal stand out. I recommend them to all my clients.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.headerDescription: We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a question about our products, need help with an order, or just want to say hello.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.faqDescription: Find answers to common questions about our products, shipping, and policies.
contact.visitOurStoreDescription: Come visit our physical store and experience our products in person.
contact.contactInfoDescription: You can reach us at the following contact points.

faqItems.question: What is your return policy?
faqItems.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for all items in original condition. Free returns on orders over $100.00.

faqItems.question: How long does shipping take?
faqItems.answer: Standard shipping takes 3-5 business days. Express shipping (1-2 days) and overnight options available.

faqItems.question: Do you offer international shipping?
faqItems.answer: Yes, we ship worldwide. International shipping typically takes 7-14 business days depending on location.

faqItems.question: Can I track my order?
faqItems.answer: You'll receive a tracking number via email once your order ships. You can also track orders in your account.
